segments.text: Hi, this is Hamza speaking. I'm calling to follow up on the North Star Technologies
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: project update. I wanted to confirm the important details from our previous discussion.
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: As you remember, the project kickoff meeting is actually scheduled for this upcoming Tuesday,
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: September 22nd, 2026 at 10 a.m. EST time through Microsoft Teams, and I would send out the meeting
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: link via email. The updated project documents, including the timeline, the budget breakdown,
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: and the technical requirements will need to be completed by you guys by Wednesday,
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: September 16th, 2026 at 3 p.m. Just reviewing the approved project budget, we've set that to
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: $75,000 with the first payment of $25,000 due Thursday, October 1st, 2026. The implementation
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: phase will officially begin Monday, October 5th, 2026, and the expected completion date is
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: Friday, November 20th, 2026. The main contacts for this project are the following Emily Johnson,
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: the project manager, Michael Reed, the technical lead, and Sarah Patel, the client
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: representative. I will also need to schedule a follow up meeting Thursday, September 24th,
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: 2026 at 2.30 p.m. EST time to review the feedback and discuss the next steps. Before I
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: end this call, I wanted to make sure I remembered everything correctly. The documents are due the
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: 16th is 3 p.m. The kickoff meeting, September 22nd at 10 a.m. The follow-up meeting is
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: September 24th at 2.30 p.m. The payment is due October 1st, and the project starts October 5th,
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: and the project should be completed November 20th. I have another meeting starting soon,
segments.speaker: Humza?

segments.text: so I'll have to call you back later today, probably 8 p.m.
segments.speaker: Humza?
